full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #16 (2026-04-29)

PULSE
Health: 0.4972 (C). 894 wallets, 153 contributors. 50 memos today vs 132 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
47 reward payments, 339659 PFT distributed to 26 contributors. Top earner: r4RPpe...WghS (35686 PFT).

AIRDROPS
3 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 27,800 PFT. Highest: r4ahFv...5XyU (10,000 PFT). Lowest: r4ahFv...5XyU (8,500 PFT). 7-day leader: r4ahFv...5XyU (71,400 PFT, avg 8,925/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): r4RPpe...WghS (60 memos). Fastest new contributor: rDVKRN...tyjB (31.3 memos/day in 19 days). 11 new wallet(s) this week. 29 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 82.0%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-03-30): 7899 transactions from 71 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
